dataset: NOSH ChartingSystem with Synthea patient data

pi_items.source: ICD-10-CM Code I10 corresponds to 'Essential (primary) hypertension' (verified via icd10data.com, AAPC, and clinical coding standards)
ICD-10-CM official code for Essential (primary) hypertension per 2026 ICD-10-CM Diagnosis Code Database and AAPC documentation
Date format YYYY-MM-DD matches SQL DATE type stored in NOSH issues table (issue_date_active field) as verified in export_result.sh line 29
setup_task.sh line 25 explicitly writes target patient name to this path: echo '${TARGET_FNAME} ${TARGET_LNAME}' > /tmp/target_patient.txt
setup_task.sh line 26 explicitly writes target patient PID to this path: echo '${TARGET_PID}' > /tmp/target_patient_pid.txt
Open-source electronic health record system developed by shihjay2, confirmed via GitHub repository (shihjay2/nosh2), official website (noshemr.wordpress.com), and multiple clinical EHR directories
setup_nosh.sh lines 10-11 define admin credentials; line 148 hashes Admin1234! for bcrypt password verification
setup_nosh.sh line 206 loads /workspace/data/patients.sql which contains Synthea-generated data; Synthea confirmed as open-source synthetic patient population simulator (synthea.mitre.org)

privileged_info_summary: This task uses NOSH ChartingSystem, an open-source electronic health record system. The task requires adding a problem list entry for Essential Hypertension (ICD-10: I10) with an onset date of 2024-08-15. The condition code I10 is the standard ICD-10-CM code for essential (primary) hypertension. Patient data is synthetic, generated by Synthea, and randomly selected at runtime from the NOSH database. Default admin credentials are admin/Admin1234!.
